title: Middle Eastern Vegan Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan pilaf dish inspired by the Middle Eastern cuisine, made with fragrant spices and red rice.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the fragrant spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turmeric, sumac, and cumin, and cook for another minute.
Add the red rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with parsley.
